title: Match Cake 2D
description: Match Cake 2D is an engaging puzzle game where players click to change the positions of various cake pieces on a 2D grid. The objective is to align similar cakes in a row or column to score points. As players advance, the game introduces more complex cake types and obstacles, enhancing the challenge. website dev https://www.playbestgames.io/
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
